det_check_template:
proof fn det_alloc_and_map_4k(pre_self_: PageAllocator, pcid: Pcid, va: VAddr, c_ptr: ContainerPtr, post1_self_: PageAllocator, r1: PagePtr, post2_self_: PageAllocator, r2: PagePtr)
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.free_pages_4k.len() > 0), (pre_self_.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c_ptr)),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_4k().remove(r1))
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.allocated_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapped_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_4k().insert(r1))
            &&& (post1_self_.mapped_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapped_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_1g())
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.page_is_mapped(p)]
                #![trigger post1_self_.page_mappings(p)]
                post1_self_.page_is_mapped(p) && p != r1 ==> post1_self_.page_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(p) && post1_self_.page_io_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(p))
            &&& (post1_self_.page_mappings(r1) =~= Set::<(Pcid, VAddr)>::empty().insert((pcid, va)))
            &&& (post1_self_.page_mappings(r1).contains((pcid, va)))
            &&& (post1_self_.page_io_mappings(r1) =~= Set::<(IOid, VAddr)>::empty())
            &&& (pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k().contains(r1) == false)
            &&& (page_ptr_valid(r1))
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_4k@.dom() =~= post1_self_.container_map_4k@.dom())
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_2m@.dom() =~= post1_self_.container_map_2m@.dom())
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_1g@.dom() =~= post1_self_.container_map_1g@.dom())
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr| #![auto] post1_self_.page_is_mapped(p) <== pre_self_.page_is_mapped(p))
            &&& (!pre_self_.page_is_mapped(r1))
            &&& (post1_self_.page_is_mapped(r1))
            &&& (post1_self_.free_pages_4k.len() == pre_self_.free_pages_4k.len() - 1)
            &&& (forall|c: ContainerPtr|
                #![auto]
                post1_self_.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c) && c_ptr != c
                    ==> post1_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c) =~= pre_self_.get_container_owned_pages(
                    c,
                ))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c_ptr) =~= pre_self_.get_container_owned_pages(
                c_ptr,
            ).insert(r1))
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_4k().remove(r2))
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.free_pages_1g())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.allocated_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.allocated_pages_1g())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapped_pages_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_4k().insert(r2))
            &&& (post2_self_.mapped_pages_2m() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapped_pages_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapped_pages_1g())
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.page_is_mapped(p)]
                #![trigger post2_self_.page_mappings(p)]
                post2_self_.page_is_mapped(p) && p != r2 ==> post2_self_.page_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_mappings(p) && post2_self_.page_io_mappings(p) =~= pre_self_.page_io_mappings(p))
            &&& (post2_self_.page_mappings(r2) =~= Set::<(Pcid, VAddr)>::empty().insert((pcid, va)))
            &&& (post2_self_.page_mappings(r2).contains((pcid, va)))
            &&& (post2_self_.page_io_mappings(r2) =~= Set::<(IOid, VAddr)>::empty())
            &&& (pre_self_.allocated_pages_4k().contains(r2) == false)
            &&& (page_ptr_valid(r2))
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_4k@.dom() =~= post2_self_.container_map_4k@.dom())
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_2m@.dom() =~= post2_self_.container_map_2m@.dom())
            &&& (pre_self_.container_map_1g@.dom() =~= post2_self_.container_map_1g@.dom())
            &&& (forall|p: PagePtr| #![auto] post2_self_.page_is_mapped(p) <== pre_self_.page_is_mapped(p))
            &&& (!pre_self_.page_is_mapped(r2))
            &&& (post2_self_.page_is_mapped(r2))
            &&& (post2_self_.free_pages_4k.len() == pre_self_.free_pages_4k.len() - 1)
            &&& (forall|c: ContainerPtr|
                #![auto]
                post2_self_.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c) && c_ptr != c
                    ==> post2_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c) =~= pre_self_.get_container_owned_pages(
                    c,
                ))
            &&& (post2_self_.get_container_owned_pages(c_ptr) =~= pre_self_.get_container_owned_pages(
                c_ptr,
            ).insert(r2))
        }) ==> det_alloc_and_map_4k_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
